name: GOLFTEC Baton Rouge
about: GOLFTEC Baton Rouge is a dedicated golf training and club fitting studio focused on using technology and expert coaching to help golfers of all skill levels improve. The facility offers private lessons, custom club fittings, and practice memberships centered around advanced technology, including launch monitors, high-speed video analysis, and OPTIMOTION motion tracking to provide data-driven feedback. With a pricing model built on membership plans and a starting point of $95 for a Swing Evaluation or club fitting, the center is designed for serious golfers seeking structured, consistent improvement.
why_golfers_like_it: Advanced technology provides precise data for swing analysis and club fitting
Structured membership plans offer a clear path to long-term improvement
Expert certified coaches provide personalized instruction and game plans

simulator_hardware.notes: Primary launch monitor used for lessons and fittings

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own golf clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, you can bring your own clubs, but the studio also provides club rentals and offers professional club fitting services.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: There is no mention of on-site food and beverage service, so it's best to check with the center directly regarding outside food or drink.

faq.question: How long does it take to play a full 18 holes?
faq.answer: Time for a full 18-hole simulation is not specified on the website, but sessions are structured around skill development and practice plans.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue offers youth golf lessons with a 30% discount for juniors under 18 and is dedicated to developing young golfers.
